about.title: ABOUT US
about.heading: Premium commodities from source to global markets
about.description: We're more than a trading company.. We are a trusted link between producers and buyers. We work closely with partners across Africa and Europe to source high-quality commodities and deliver them reliably to international markets.
missionItems: Ensure consistent quality and transparent sourcing
Deliver products through efficient logistics and strong partnerships
about.badgeOne:
Driven by Market Expertise,
Guided by Trust

hero.title: The Products We Trade
hero.subtitle: Cocoa products, green coffee, soya derivatives, cashew and sesame, groundnuts, exotic dried fruits, raw cotton, and other tropical commodities.

section1.title: Global Commodity Sourcing
section1.description: We source cocoa, coffee, avocado oil, cotton, soybeans, and other commodities directly from our trusted producers.

section2.title: Quality Control & Inspection
section2.description: Products are verified through quality checks and independent inspections to meet international standards.

section3.title: Logistics & Trade Execution
section3.description: End-to-end coordination of transport, documentation, and delivery for efficient B2B transactions.

hero.title: Our Partners
hero.subtitle: Strong partnerships with leading logistics and inspection companies support our global supply chain operations

card1.title: Reliable Trade, Delivered with Precision
card1.description: We believe successful commodity trading depends on reliable partners, efficient logistics, and precise execution at every stage of the supply chain.

card2.title: Quality, Compliance & Transparency
card2.description: Our cooperation with global logistics and inspection partners ensures products meet international standards and arrive as specified.

hero.title: Know The Founder
hero.subtitle: Leadership with Global Trade Expertise Built on Years of International Commodity Experience

profile.title: Meet Grzegorz Winiarek
profile.bio: Grzegorz Winiarek is an economist and international commodities expert with over 20 years of experience in trading cocoa, coffee, cotton, nuts, dairy, meat, and other bulk products. As co-founder of B2B Commodities, he connects suppliers from Africa, Asia, and Latin America with markets in Europe and Poland, creating global trade opportunities.
profile.extra: Beyond business, he is passionate about sports and world music.

footer.point2: Focused on quality, compliance, and transparency
